title: CITY OF HILLSBORO, CORNELIUS, & SHERWOOD WATER BILL VERIFICATION ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: SALVATION ARMY WASHINGTON COUNTY HOPE CENTER CITY OF HILLSBORO, CORNELIUS, & SHERWOOD WATER BILL VERIFICATION ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers water bill assistance when funds are available. 1440 SE 21st Avenue Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: -Must meet income guidelines -City of Cornelius bill relief program will help with up to 2 bills not to exceed $300 in 12-month period -City of Hillsboro water clients must be approved by water district before coming in to apply for service. Assistance is available once per year. -City of Sherwood clients must be approved by City of Sherwood before coming in to apply for service. Assistance is generally limited to once per year, but may request additional assistance from the city -Water bill must be in the name of the applicant -Must have shut-off notice Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 9am-noon Emergency Walk-ins: 1st Thursday of the month 1pm-4pm Email (503) 640-4311 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 640-4311 Main phone Main phone (503) 640-4311 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for more information FEES: If currently disconnected, client must be able to pay the $50 reconnection fee in order to receive assistance DOCUMENTS: -ID for all household members 18 and older -Proof of income for all household members 18 and older or who are currently employed or have been in the last 12 months -Current utility bill in applicant's name who is applying for assistance LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Cornelius, Hillsboro, and Sherwood Services: Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD ASSISTANCE UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SALVATION ARMY WASHINGTON COUNTY HOPE CENTER
